overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a slow exploration of an abandoned, flooded urban plaza. The camera approaches a derelict building with 'FUTURE' signage before tilting up to reveal a massive industrial megastructure with construction scaffolding against a twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded abandoned plaza with derelict storefront

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through shallow water toward the abandoned building facade, observing the graffiti and signage

entered.detail: curved concrete building with 'FUTURE' graffiti and metal security shutters
tall industrial skyscraper with exposed structural elements visible in the distance
metal crane arms extending from the top of the distant tower
thick industrial cables and pipes running between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a flooded urban plaza in a dystopian city, approaching a derelict building with faded 'FUTURE' signage. The area is completely abandoned with no pedestrians or vehicles. In the background, a massive industrial megastructure with construction cranes looms against the twilight sky, while overhead cables crisscross the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical view of industrial megastructure under construction

events.description: camera tilts upward from horizontal to vertical orientation to follow the tower height

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to examine the full height of the industrial tower, studying the scaffolding and structural details against the sky

entered.detail: rusted metal platforms and ladders attached to the tower facade
open structural steel framework visible on the tower sides

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the massive industrial megastructure, revealing intricate scaffolding and exposed girders against the darkening sky. The abandoned building from the previous segment falls away below as the view becomes dominated by the tower's imposing vertical architecture. Construction cranes remain visible on the left, now appearing closer as the perspective shifts to emphasize the structure's height.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a desolate, flooded urban plaza and ascends to reveal the overwhelming scale of a dystopian megastructure. It begins by gliding across the abandoned plaza toward a derelict building marked with faded FUTURE signage, while overhead cables crisscross the frame against a twilight sky. As the camera reaches the building, it tilts upward, causing the flooded ground and ruins to fall away from view. The perspective then shifts to focus entirely on the imposing vertical architecture of the industrial tower, emphasizing its intricate scaffolding and exposed girders. Finally, the view expands to highlight the massive construction cranes looming against the darkening sky, completing the transition from the street level to the heights of the city.
